name: Pisgah Gospel Ministries Food Pantry
description:
Don't visit pantry without appointment.
Appointments can be made via the Plentiful App
Or by texting "PGM FOOD" to 726-879

People without an appointment have to wait until 11:30 a.m., and if they have any food left they will distribute it.
tags: ID required,Must bring own bags/cart,Schedule appointment through Plentiful app

name: Beulah SDA Church

name: Mount Vernon Fresh Market
description:
Arrive 10–15 minutes early and bring sturdy, reusable bags to make loading easier.
Feeding Westchester’s fleet delivers directly to community centers, schools, and other central locations. Each stop follows a simple first-come, first-served model; no ID or appointment required. Volunteers will greet you, explain how the line moves, and help carry items if needed.
tags: First come, first serve: open until food runs out
